---
Title: 'How do equity sectors differ in returns, volatility, and sensitivity to the overall market?'
Format: html
output-file: index.html
---

# Which U.S. Equity Sectors Really Behaved Differently in the Last Decade and a Half? 

Word count: xxxx words


## Introduction

The first comparison used by people to analyse equity sectors is almost always returns, but choosing the right sector is about so much more than that. 

Introduce the topic and the data used in the analysis. It compares major equity sectors using daily market data. The goal is to see how sectors differ in performance, volatility, and sensitivity to overall market movements. this is the base to my question: "How do equity sectors differ in returns, volatility, and sensitivity to the overall market?"

## Data

This section will describe the sector ETFs, the market benchmark, the sample period, and the cleaning process.
I will use the following sectors:

## Results

This section will present figures and summary statistics and regression results that are made in python. 

## Analysis
This section will interpret the results and discuss the differences between sectors in terms of returns, volatility, and sensitivity to the overall market. I will also discuss any interesting patterns or trends that emerge from the data.

## Conclusion
This section will summarise the main findings and discuss the limits of the analysis.
